title: WebNami Alternatives — Compare Blogging Platforms
description: See how WebNami compares to WordPress, Ghost, Medium, Wix, Squarespace, and more. Free, self-hosted, and built on plain files.

hero.heading: WebNami vs everything else
hero.subheading: How does WebNami stack up against the most popular blogging platforms? Pick a comparison to find out.

alternatives.name: WordPress
alternatives.description: No database, no plugins to maintain, no PHP security patches. Just Markdown files and a static site.

alternatives.name: Ghost
alternatives.description: All the writing focus of Ghost without the $9–$199/month hosting bill or the Node.js server to maintain.

alternatives.name: Medium
alternatives.description: Your content on your domain, your audience yours to keep, and no platform taking a cut of your earnings.

alternatives.name: Blogger
alternatives.description: Modern, fast, and fully owned by you — no risk of Google shutting it down like Reader or Google+.

alternatives.name: Wix
alternatives.description: No monthly fees, no heavy JavaScript runtime, and no walled garden that prevents you from leaving.

alternatives.name: Squarespace
alternatives.description: Beautiful blogs without the $16–$49/month subscription or the content lock-in that makes migrating painful.

alternatives.name: Bear Blog
alternatives.description: The same minimal philosophy with a full admin dashboard, custom theming, and content you actually own.

alternatives.name: Publii
alternatives.description: Static site benefits without the desktop-only constraint — manage your blog from any browser.

alternatives.name: DropInBlog
alternatives.description: A complete standalone blog for free instead of a $29–$99/month embedded widget tied to someone else's SaaS.
